overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking from a medieval harbor village with stone fortifications and wooden ship construction into a dense coniferous forest trail during golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval harbor village path with ship construction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside stone fortifications, passing wooden ship frames and campfires

notable_agents.action: villager in red tunic standing near stone wall watching the character approach
worker standing near wooden scaffolding by the ship construction

entered.detail: tall gray stone defensive wall with rough texture running alongside the path
large wooden boat under construction with exposed ribs and scaffolding
burning fire pit with orange flames and smoke rising near the harbor
wooden support beams and planks surrounding the ship construction site
calm blue water of the harbor visible between wooden structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path beside a tall stone fortification wall on the right, with a medieval shipyard on the left featuring wooden ship frames under construction. Campfires burn near the harbor water, and a few villagers stand scattered along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: village gate exit transitioning to forest edge

events.description: character passes through stone gate archway leaving the village harbor area

agents.ego_description: passing through the village gate and continuing onto the forest trail beyond the walls

notable_agents.action: armored guard walking in the opposite direction through the gate

entered.detail: stone archway marking the exit from the village with wooden doors
tall evergreen pine trees marking the beginning of the forest

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a stone gate archway, transitioning from the village to the forest edge. The stone wall moves from the right to the left side as the path curves, and pine trees begin to appear on the right. An armored guard walks in the opposite direction through the gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coniferous forest trail with dappled sunlight

events.description: fully enters dense forest environment leaving all stone structures behind

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through tall pine forest with dappled sunlight

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulder beside the forest path
distant snow-capped mountain visible through the trees
dense grass and bushes lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: Now fully immersed in the dense pine forest, the character walks along a winding dirt trail surrounded by tall evergreen trees. The stone walls of the village are left behind, replaced by natural rock outcrops and thick undergrowth. Dappled sunlight filters through the canopy, and distant mountains are visible through gaps in the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a fortified medieval harbor village into the depths of a dense coniferous forest. It begins on a narrow dirt path flanked by a tall stone wall and a shipyard where wooden ship frames stand under construction near burning campfires. As the character passes through a stone gate archway, the village architecture recedes and the stone wall shifts to the left, making way for the first pine trees appearing on the right. The scene then opens into a winding forest trail where the man-made fortifications are replaced by natural rock outcrops and thick undergrowth. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the evergreen canopy as dappled sunlight filters through the branches, revealing distant mountains through gaps in the trees.
